nodes.label: Creates the ExcelFile entity and a popup to upload it. The 'ExcelFileImport' enity will be used to attach the real excelfile to, this happens in the popup

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ImporterHelper.ACT_ExcelFileImport_Create
NODES=7; EDGES=4
1. START
2. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create ImporterHelper.ExcelFileImport as NewExcelFileImport
3. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change ImportTransactionHelper (ImportTransactionHelper_ExcelFileImport=$NewExcelFileImport; refreshInClient=false)
4. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page ImporterHelper.ExcelFileImport_Upload
5. END

nodes.label: RetrieveAction: retrieve ImportTransactionHelperList over association ImportTransactionHelper_ExcelFileImport from ExcelFileImport
nodes.detail: retrieve ImportTransactionHelperList over association ImportTransactionHelper_ExcelFileImport from ExcelFileImport

nodes.label: Runs the Importer flow (copied/edited from the ExcelImporter) and closes the page. The importerflow uses the Excelfiles selected in the upload popup (attachted ...

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ImporterHelper.ACT_ExcelFileImport_ImportToNP
NODES=13; EDGES=10
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ImportTransactionHelperList over association ImportTransactionHelper_ExcelFileImport from ExcelFileImport
3. ACTION ListOperationAction: ListOperationAction (output=ImportTransactionHelper, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
4. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ImporterHelper.SUB_ImportTemplateDocument -> Imported
5. DECISION Is Variable? expression=$Imported = true
6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  7. ACTION CommitAction: commit ImportTransactionHelper (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
  8. ACTION CommitAction: commit ExcelFileImport (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
  9. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page (pagesToClose=1)
  10. END
11. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  12. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  13. END

nodes.label: CreateObjectAction: create SmartExpenses.Transaction as Transaction (Transaction_FBGProfile=$FBGProfile, TransactionCode=$IteratorImportTransaction/Transactiereferentie, Name=$IteratorImportTransaction/Tegenpartij, Description=$IteratorImportTransaction/Omschrijving, InOut=if $IteratorImportTransaction/Bedrag >= 0 then SmartExpenses.ENUM_TransactionSort.income else SmartExpenses.ENUM_TransactionSort.expenditure, Value=abs($IteratorImportTransaction/Bedrag), TransactionDate=$IteratorImportTransaction/Datum, EntryDate=[%BeginOfCurrentDay%], +2 more)
nodes.detail: create SmartExpenses.Transaction as Transaction (Transaction_FBGProfile=$FBGProfile, TransactionCode=$IteratorImportTransaction/Transactiereferentie, Name=$IteratorImportTransaction/Tegenpartij, Description=$IteratorImportTransaction/Omschrijving, InOut=if $IteratorImportTransaction/Bedrag >= 0 then SmartExpenses.ENUM_TransactionSort.income else SmartExpenses.ENUM_TransactionSort.expenditure, Value=abs($IteratorImportTransaction/Bedrag), TransactionDate=$IteratorImportTransaction/Datum, EntryDate=[%BeginOfCurrentDay%], +2 more)

nodes.label: RetrieveAction: retrieve ImportTransactionList over association ImportTransaction_ImportTransactionHelper from ImportTransactionHelper
nodes.detail: retrieve ImportTransactionList over association ImportTransaction_ImportTransactionHelper from ImportTransactionHelper

nodes.label: todo validatie flow checken of alle columns er zijn

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ImporterHelper.ACT_ImportTransaction_AcceptTransactions
NODES=11; EDGES=6
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ImportTransactionList over association ImportTransaction_ImportTransactionHelper from ImportTransactionHelper
3. ACTION CreateListAction: CreateListAction (output=TransactionList, entity=SmartExpenses.Transaction, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
4. LOOP iterate ImportTransactionList as IteratorImportTransaction
  5. LOOP BODY
    6. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow SmartExpenses.SUB_Transaction_setStatus
    7. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create SmartExpenses.Transaction as Transaction (Transaction_FBGProfile=$FBGProfile, TransactionCode=$IteratorImportTransaction/Transactiereferentie, Name=$IteratorImportTransaction/Tegenpartij, Description=$IteratorImportTransaction/Omschrijving, InOut=if $IteratorImportTransaction/Bedrag >= 0 then SmartExpenses.ENUM_TransactionSort.income else SmartExpenses.ENUM_TransactionSort.expenditure, Value=abs($IteratorImportTransaction/Bedrag), TransactionDate=$IteratorImportTransaction/Datum, EntryDate=[%BeginOfCurrentDay%], +2 more)
    8. ACTION ChangeListAction: change TransactionList (type=Add, value=$Transaction)
    9. ACTION DeleteAction: delete IteratorImportTransaction (refreshInClient=false)
    10. ACTION ChangeListAction: change ImportTransactionList (type=Remove, value=$IteratorImportTransaction)
11. ACTION CommitAction: commit TransactionList (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
12. ACTION CommitAction: commit ImportTransactionList (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
13. END

FLOW Microflow: ImporterHelper.ACT_ImportTransaction_ShowPage
NODES=5; EDGES=3
1. START
2. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create ImporterHelper.ImportTransactionHelper as NewImportTransactionHelper
3. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page ImporterHelper.ImportTransaction_Overview
4. END

nodes.label: ShowMessageAction: show message (text=Het is gelukt! {1} transacties zijn opgehaald!, type=Information, blocking=true)
nodes.detail: show message (text=Het is gelukt! {1} transacties zijn opgehaald!, type=Information, blocking=true)

nodes.label: ShowMessageAction: show message (text=Het ophalen van transacties is niet gelukt!, type=Error, blocking=true)
nodes.detail: show message (text=Het ophalen van transacties is niet gelukt!, type=Error, blocking=true)

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ImporterHelper.CWS_GetProducts
NODES=10; EDGES=8
1. START
2. ACTION RestCallAction: RestCallAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
3. DECISION Response full? expression=$Response != empty
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=CountTransactions, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  6. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=Het is gelukt! {1} transacties zijn opgehaald!, type=Information, blocking=true)
  7. ACTION CommitAction: commit Response (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
  8. END
9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  10. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=Het ophalen van transacties is niet gelukt!, type=Error, blocking=true)
  11. END

nodes.label: Op basis van de template (nu Rabo) Wordt de import flow van Excleimporter aangeroepen. Deze staat ingesteld (in het template zelf, via de admin page) op dat het...
has a template selected expression=$Template != empty
nodes.detail: has a template selected expression=$Template != empty

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ImporterHelper.SUB_ImportTemplateDocument
NODES=14; EDGES=10
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Template from ExcelImporter.Template
3. DECISION has a template selected expression=$Template != empty
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action ExcelImporter.StartImportByTemplate -> rowCount
  6. BRANCH
    7. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The import is finished. {1} records have been imported., type=Information, blocking=true)
    8. END
  9. BRANCH on error
    10. ACTION LogMessageAction: LogMessageAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    11. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The following error occurred when importing document: {1} {2}, type=Error, blocking=true)
    12. END
13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  14. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=No template selected for this file, type=Warning, blocking=true)
  15. END

nodes.label: JavaScriptActionCallAction: call javascript action Toast.showToast -> ReturnValueName

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Nanoflow: ImporterHelper.ACT_ImportTransaction_Refreshpage
NODES=7; EDGES=3
1. START
2. ACTION JavaScriptActionCallAction: call javascript action Toast.showToast -> ReturnValueName
3. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ImporterHelper.ACT_ImportTransaction_AcceptTransactions
4. END
